title: Coccothrinax alta
intro: Coccothrinax alta, also known as the Cuban thatch palm, is a species of flowering plant in the palm family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering various health benefits such as wound healing, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects, which can aid in the treatment of skin irritations, infections, and other health issues. The bioactive constituents of Coccothrinax alta include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with this plant are extracts and tinctures, which can be used in traditional medicine or as supplements to support overall health and well-being.
